rulings.Case Title: LOUISE DOUGLAS VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO AMENDED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday August 4, 2016, line 1. RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, THE SAN FRANCISCO RESIDENTIAL RENT STABILIZATION DEMURRER TO AMENDED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 16, 2016 PER STIPULATION AND ORDER = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL V. DISCEPOLA JR. VS. ELSTON MALLORY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday August 4, 2016, line 2. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL DISCEPOLA Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is GRANTED. First Amended Complaint shall be filed and served forthwith. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NGUYET ANH TO VS. CHING WONG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday August 4, 2016, line 3. DEFENDANT NGUYEN LUU DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT This action is stayed pending the resolution of Probate matter PTR-16-299661. The facts asserted in these actions are almost identical. (Compare SAC paragraph 5 and probate Petition paragraph 10). The liability in this action is premised on the validity of the amendment in light of lack of capacity allegations. Per Probate Code 17200(b)(3) determination of validity of the trust provisions is an internal affair of the trust. After the Probate matter is resolved Plaintiff shall amend her complaint to reflect the Probate Court findings. = (501/REQ)
